Allied (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $40,098,064Details
International Box Office $79,168,597
Worldwide Box Office $119,266,661
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,792,016
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,643,629
Total $4,435,645
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of intelligence officer Max Vatan, who in 1942 North Africa encounters French Resistance fighter Marianne Beausejour on a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Reunited in London, their relationship is threatened by the extreme pressures of the war.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,701,743 (31.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.16 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$106,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,160 opening theaters/3,160 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $55,414,507

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 23rd, 2016 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 20th, 2016 (Wide), released as Съюзени (Bulgaria)
November 25th, 2016 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
November 25th, 2016 (Wide) (Spain)
November 25th, 2016 (Wide) (New Zealand)
November 25th, 2016 (Wide), released as Sąjungininkai (Lithuania)
Video Release: February 14th, 2017 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for violence, some sexuality/nudity, language and brief drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2450 (Cert #50689), 11/9/2016)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Geographical setting: North Africa
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Double Agent, Dysfunctional Family, False Identity, Secret Agent, Suicide
Social setting: World War II
Subgenre: War Drama
Time period setting: 1940s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, GK Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis
